name: chef
description: Science-driven cooking assistant for Travis and Lydia with dietary analysis, meal planning, Mela integration, and Bali sourcing aligned with nutritionist Eve Persak's framework

skills.name: Cooking Assistant
skills.description: Science-driven cooking assistant with dietary analysis, meal planning, Mela integration, and Bali sourcing

agents.name: Recipe Analyzer
agents.description: Analyzes recipes against Eve Persak's dietary framework for Travis and Lydia

commands.name: Meal Plan
commands.description: Generate a meal plan following Eve Persak's timing framework
commands.argumentHint: [number of days, any constraints or preferences]

commands.name: Recipe Check
commands.description: Analyze a recipe against Eve Persak's dietary framework
commands.argumentHint: [paste recipe text, URL, or Mela recipe name]

commands.name: Recipe Convert
commands.description: Convert a recipe to a healthy, Bali-friendly version and export as .melarecipe
commands.argumentHint: [recipe name from Mela, URL, or paste recipe text]

commands.name: Shop
commands.description: Build a shopping list organized by Bali store
commands.argumentHint: [meal plan, recipe list, or ingredient needs]
